director.name: 克里斯·肯尼迪 Chris Kennedy

introduction: “A study of the incongruous and iconic suspended monorail in Wuppertal Germany. Shot on super 8 and finished on 35mm film, Phantoms expertly employs the exaggerated grainy texture of the emulsion to suggest a netherworld out of time, both science fiction and ancient history, while an accompanying text muses on the vanity and folly suggested by the mysterious structure.” – Kate MacKay, Images FestivalText by Ryan Kamstra. Financial assistance provided by the Ontario Arts Council.
